WS7-T9.title: Settings UI
WS7-T9.note: Merged main d7ccd6f (squash of PR #38, branch feat/ws7-t9-settings-ui). Settings UI: pause-nemesis toggle, 4 email + 3 push notification toggles, typed-handle delete confirm, claim-gated via inline ClaimEntry. Fable review (F1-F6) fixes applied; INV-10 flaky test fixed via vi.useFakeTimers in question-state-view.test.tsx. Rebased onto main once for a copy.ts additive conflict (threadCopy vs settingsCopy).

WS8-T2.title: Share cards + share sheet
WS8-T2.note: Recovered a prior interrupted agent's checkpointed WIP, verified against the 3 ACs (loss+busted-streak render, QR decodes to canonical URL, share_completed fires end-to-end), fixed a merge-induced share-button wiring gap in RevealSequence (WS7-T3 moved revealed-state rendering out of ViewerStrip after this branch diverged), added QR decode-proof tests. Full build/lint/test/integration/e2e green.

WS8-T4.title: oEmbed + meta + sitemap
WS8-T4.note: PR #48 open: GET /api/oembed (same-host pattern-match, SSRF-hardened, never fetches url=) + /sitemap.xml (revealed questions + visible profiles). Unit/integration/e2e all green.

WS8-T5.title: SEO archive pass
WS8-T5.note: Merged main 45d0141 (squash of PR #67). /q archive (force-dynamic, mirrors sitemap.ts's DATABASE_URL-at-build-time precedent), Article/ItemList JSON-LD, canonical tag added to /q/[slug], robots.txt with explicit og/oembed allow. Fable review fixes applied (robots.txt allow-list, removed dead truncated field). pct_yes rounding inconsistency in serialize-question.ts flagged as a pre-existing, out-of-scope follow-up.

Wired VerdictCard + rematch-by-swipe into /nemesis; useDragCommit shared hook extracted from SwipeBallot. 4 fable review rounds (untested gesture mapping, false margin boasts on draws + tiebreaks, double-submit guard, racy test helper under parallel workers, commit haptic, pinned-AC wording violation) — all fixed.

SW10-T4.title: Wire ReactionStamps into /vs/[pairingId] [contract-change]
SW10-T4.note: Merged. ReactionStamps wired into NemesisMatchupCard (read: cached today_reactions on pairing payload; write: new claimed-participant-only, block-severed enforcement, no prior layer existed). 2 fable review rounds (doc-contract gap, stale SideBlock badge after posting, untested client-derived round-trip path, judgment-call docs) — all fixed.

SW10-T5.title: Visual regression gate for the /dev/ui gallery
SW10-T5.note: Spec: docs/plans/sw-revamp-wiring-gaps.md §4 SW10-T5 (completes SW8-T2's unmet snapshot AC). toHaveScreenshot over every gallery tile, baselines committed, CI-gating; deliberate-pixel-change demo in the PR; extend the existing playwright-report artifact upload.

WS15-T1.title: Kalshi adapter: current API schema (*_dollars fields) + listing strategy
WS15-T1.note: Live-verified 2026-07-20: trade-api/v2 now returns dollars-string fields (liquidity_dollars, yes_bid_dollars, last_price_dollars); legacy cents-int fields gone. Unfiltered /markets dominated by zero-interest KXMVE combos. Staging synced 0 kalshi markets.

WS15-T2.title: Voiding a daily frees its date slot for a replacement
WS15-T2.note: questions_daily_date_uq has no status exclusion; composer pre-check rejects re-compose after void. Index must exclude voided; daily lookups prefer non-voided; streak history dedupe by date.

WS15-T3.title: Worker Dockerfile: build venues+engine in-image (stale-dist hazard)
WS15-T3.note: apps/worker/Dockerfile builds core/db/worker but ships packages/venues + packages/engine dist straight from the build context — a stale local dist gets baked in silently (bit the WS15-T1 staging rollout: v2 image had the pre-fix adapter).

WS15-T4.title: Curate UI: venue/category filters + cursor 'Load more' in market browser
WS15-T4.note: API already supports ?venue/?category/?cursor + next_cursor meta; CurationClient fetches one unfiltered 50-row page. With 200 same-day Kalshi rows, Polymarket (07-31 close) never surfaces.

WS15-T5.title: turbo.json: pass FLAG_* through to builds (Vercel bakes flag-off statics)
WS15-T5.note: Vercel wraps monorepo builds in turbo; globalPassThroughEnv lacks FLAG_* so FLAG_SWIPE_BALLOT was stripped and /placement prerendered swipeBallot:false despite the env var. Same trap documented in sw-revamp-wiring-gaps for local pnpm build.

WS15-T6.title: Composer guardrail: default question_date to ET-today; reject past lock_at
WS15-T6.note: A daily composed for a stale date (curator's local TZ behind ET) creates a stillborn question: all lifecycle times past, invisible on the ET-keyed today lookup. Bit staging 2026-07-20 02:19 ET.

WS15-T7.title: Default daily open time -> 12:00 AM PT (03:00 ET)
WS15-T7.note: Product decision (owner request): question should be open from midnight Pacific. ET-anchored scheduler unchanged; DAILY_OPEN_LOCAL constant moves 09:00 -> 03:00 ET (PT and ET shift DST together, so 03:00 ET is always midnight PT).
